path = "/mnt/data/file-5uuPfQtBECXdyCf6EuWnvQ-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    raw = f.read()
len(raw), raw[:1000]
for k, (start, end) in spans.items(): print(k, end-start, raw[start:end][:60])

# confirm there is no additional occurrence of these segments beyond the first index
occurrences = []
for k, (start, end) in spans.items():
    segment = segments[k]
    first = raw.find(segment)
    # find all occurrences
    idxs = []
    start_search = 0
    while True:
        idx = raw.find(segment, start_search)
        if idx == -1:
            break
        idxs.append(idx)
        start_search = idx+1
    occurrences.append((k, idxs))
occurrences

span_texts = [
    ("ayah1","إِنَّا أَنزَلْنَاهُ فِي لَيْلَةِ الْقَدْرِ","Aya",225,267),
    ("ayah2","وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ مَا لَيْلَةُ الْقَدْرِ","Aya",308,346),
    ("hadith1","ليلة القدر خير من ألف شهر","Hadith",429,454),
    ("hadith2","خير أيامكم يوم رمضان، فمن لم يُستحب له في هذا الشهر لم يُستحب له في غيره","Hadith",509,581),
    ("hadith3","من قام رمضان إيماناً ولهوًا كان مثل من قام ليلة القدر","Hadith",639,692),
    ("hadith4","كان رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم يُغسل في رمضان كل ليلة، ويُزين لنا القرآن كل ليلة","Hadith",740,822),
]
for name, text, typ, s, e in span_texts:
    print(name, text, typ, s, e, raw[s:e])

# verify each
proofs = []
for k, (start, end) in [(k, (start, end)) for k,(start,end) in [
    ("ayah1",(225,267)),
    ("ayah2",(308,346)),
    ("hadith1",(429,454)),
    ("hadith2",(509,581)),
    ("hadith3",(639,692)),
    ("hadith4",(740,822))
]]:
    proofs.append(raw[start:end])
proofs
